raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made a hotel booking using my American Express card, and was charged {$560.00}. Unfortunately, due to an emergency medical situation I was diagnosed with XXXX XXXX  and had to undergo surgery during that period I was unable to use the reservation. 

I contacted American Express to dispute the charge, and the dispute was initially resolved in my favor, and the amount was refunded. However, I was later informed that the hotel did not accept the dispute, and the charge was posted to my account again.
